senses.gloss: elative degree of صَغِير (ṣaḡīr):; smaller; smallest
elative degree of صَغِير (ṣaḡīr):; younger; youngest
lesser (of two, or rarely more than two, things: the smaller in size, in value, in importance etc.)
to demean, to degrade; to belittle, to humiliate, to disparage

etymology.text:
Elative of صَغِير (ṣaḡīr, “small, young”).

Causative of صَغُرَ (ṣaḡura, “to be or become small”) and صَغِرَ (ṣaḡira, “to be or become small”).
